Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Michael Oliver As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM WARSHAUER, FLORENCE WARSHAUER'S Motion To Appoint Michael Oliver As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

Appearances: Kimberly Chu of Brayton Purcell (415.898.1555) for plaintiffs and moving parties; No other appearances.

Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs' and Petitioner's motion to appoint Michael Oliver as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for, deceased plaintiff William Warshauer and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (503/GLW)
